_meta.purpose: Verified settlement-administrator-site facts for live settlements in the claim-path registry. Each record mirrors what the admin site itself publishes: claims URL, administrator, fund, class definition, important dates, claim-form requirement. Joined into liveSettlements by claim-paths-build.py via token + nameNeedles substring match.
_meta.verification: adminVerified=true means the facts were confirmed against the administrator site or multiple independent sources on verifiedOn date. Entries are date-sensitive: a claimDeadline in the past means the window is CLOSED regardless of what the catalogs say.

schema.tokens: canonical defendant tokens this record attaches to
schema.nameNeedles: lowercase substrings; record joins to a liveSettlements row when any needle appears in its name or defendant string
schema.claimFormRequired: true = a claim must be filed to get paid; false = payment/relief is automatic for the fixed class
schema.importantDates: ISO dates from the admin site; null = not set/unknown

_meta.sweep: 2026-06-11 full verification sweep: every live settlement searched as '<company> class action settlement administrator website'; deadline, fund, and claim requirements captured. adminVerified=false rows = official portal not located; confirm before outreach.

settlements.settlement: Leedeman v. Midland Credit Management, Inc.
settlements.court: Santa Clara County Superior Court (CA), Case No. 19CV354554
settlements.perClaimant: Pro rata share of $318,000 — depends on participating class members
settlements.classDefinition: All persons with California addresses to whom MCM sent an initial written communication (per Exhibits 1 and 2 of the First Amended Complaint) attempting to collect a charged-off Capital One Bank (USA) consumer debt sold to MCM on or after January 1, 2014, not returned undeliverable, during the period one year before filing through class certification.
settlements.whatToProvide: Nothing — class members on MCM's mailing list are paid automatically; optional preferred-payment-method election on the site.
settlements.notes: CLASS IS FIXED — defined by MCM's own mailing list; people outside the notice list cannot join. Opt-out/objection deadline has passed. CA Fair Debt Buying Practices Act (Civil Code 1788.52(d)(1)) claim, not FDCPA. Do not pitch as an open claim opportunity.

settlements.settlement: Munoz, et al. v. PHH Corp., et al.
settlements.perClaimant: $875 per eligible loan
settlements.classDefinition: All persons who obtained residential mortgage loans originated and/or acquired by PHH or affiliates January 1, 2007 through December 31, 2009 and purchased private mortgage insurance reinsured through PHH's captive reinsurance arrangements, plus successors and heirs.
settlements.whatToProvide: Claim form online or by mail; loan identification for a 2007-2009 PHH-originated/acquired mortgage with PMI.
settlements.notes: Final approval granted 2025-12-19. Tier-1 matchable: 2007-09 mortgage tradelines naming PHH. Fixed $875/loan, no dilution.

settlements.settlement: Angus, et al. v. Flagstar Bank, N.A.
settlements.perClaimant: ~$60 cash no-proof tier (up to $599); up to $25,000 documented losses; +$100 CA CCPA payment; 3 yrs credit monitoring
settlements.classDefinition: ~2,190,000 U.S. individuals whose personal information was compromised in Flagstar's two 2021 data breaches (Jan 2021 Accellion and Dec 2021).
settlements.whatToProvide: Claim form; Class Member ID from mailed notice eases filing; documented losses for the higher tier.
settlements.notes: Admin contact 1-855-542-0397, info@FlagstarSettlement.com.

settlements.settlement: In re LastPass Data Security Incident Litigation
settlements.perClaimant: $25 base; ordinary losses up to $300; extraordinary up to $10,000; crypto theft up to $900,000 per claimant from separate pool
settlements.classDefinition: U.S. persons/entities whose LastPass account data was exposed in the Aug-Nov 2022 incident and who had data stored at the time, per LastPass notice.
settlements.whatToProvide: Claim form online by 11:59 p.m. ET or mailed by deadline; documentation for loss tiers; crypto-theft claims need supporting evidence.
settlements.notes: Opt-out/objection window already closed. Admin phone 1-877-748-1875.

settlements.settlement: In re Comcast/Xfinity Citrix Bleed Data Breach Settlement
settlements.perClaimant: $50 cash base (no documentation); up to $10,000 documented losses
settlements.classDefinition: U.S. individuals (incl. territories) who received an individual data-breach notification from Comcast around Dec 18, 2023 that their personal information may have been compromised in the Oct 16-19, 2023 breach (~31.6M people).
settlements.whatToProvide: Claim form; notice ID (lookup form on site if lost); Kroll (833) 319-2401.
settlements.notes: Some sources report extension to 2026-09-14 — treat 2026-08-14 as the hard date until the admin site confirms. Site is bot-protected; verify by phone or manual browser.

settlements.settlement: In re Fidelity Investments Data Breach Litigation
settlements.perClaimant: $100 pro rata cash + $50 CCPA (CA) + up to $5,000 documented losses + 2 yrs CyEx Financial Shield monitoring
settlements.classDefinition: Individuals who received a data breach notice from Fidelity that their financial account number and routing number were compromised between Aug 17-19, 2024 (~77,000 people).
settlements.whatToProvide: Claim form online, by mail, or email; breach-notice recipients only.
settlements.notes: Small class (~77K) — eligibility gated on having received the Fidelity notice.

settlements.settlement: Angela Keith v. Hy Cite Enterprises, LLC
settlements.perClaimant: Estimated $600-$1,000 depending on participation
settlements.classDefinition: U.S. residents who received an artificial/prerecorded voice call on a cell phone from Hy Cite between Oct 22, 2020 and Sept 10, 2025 and were NOT Hy Cite customers.
settlements.whatToProvide: Claim form online or postmarked by deadline; cell number that received the calls; non-customer attestation.
settlements.notes: Non-customers only — Tier-2 attestation play across the contactable base.

tokens: lakeview loan servicing bayview asset management pingora community loan servicing
settlements.settlement: In re Lakeview Loan Servicing Data Breach Litigation
settlements.perClaimant: Pro rata cash + up to $5,000 documented out-of-pocket; extra pro rata for CA residents
settlements.classDefinition: U.S. residents who received notice from Bayview Asset Management, Lakeview Loan Servicing, Pingora Loan Servicing, or Community Loan Servicing that the Oct 11, 2021 breach potentially compromised their information.
settlements.whatToProvide: Claim form online or postmarked by 2026-06-22; admin phone (833) 754-5757.
settlements.notes: DEADLINE IMMINENT (11 days from 2026-06-11). Notice-recipient class.

settlements.settlement: Lewis v. Register.com, Inc.
settlements.perClaimant: ~$2,130 per affected number (court estimate)
settlements.classDefinition: All persons/entities in the U.S. called by Register.com with an artificial/prerecorded voice Feb 12, 2021 - Nov 24, 2025 after the number was permanently disconnected and listed in the FCC Reassigned Numbers Database. Only 453 numbers / 1,652 calls.
settlements.whatToProvide: Name, address, and phone number only.
settlements.notes: DEADLINE IMMINENT (4 days). Tiny class (453 numbers) — cohort match probability very low; verify the specific number before filing.

settlements.settlement: Bank of America 7-Eleven FCTI ATM Out-of-Network Fee Settlement
settlements.perClaimant: Varies — out-of-network fee refunds, pro rata
settlements.classDefinition: BofA accountholders assessed more than one out-of-network balance-inquiry fee in the same visit to an FCTI ATM in a 7-Eleven, May 1, 2018 - Nov 16, 2021, who were not paid in Weiss v. FCTI.
settlements.whatToProvide: CURRENT accountholders: nothing — paid automatically. FORMER accountholders: claim form with Class Member ID from notice, online or by mail. Kroll (833) 447-8321.
settlements.notes: Hybrid: automatic for current accountholders, claim form for former ones by 2026-06-29.

settlements.settlement: In re Capital One 360 Savings Account Interest Rate Litigation
settlements.perClaimant: Pro rata on lost interest + 2-yr rate-match benefit for current accountholders
settlements.classDefinition: Anyone who held a Capital One 360 Savings account at any time from Sept 18, 2019 through June 16, 2025.
settlements.whatToProvide: Nothing — automatic payments expected on/about 2026-07-21 absent appeal. Ensure current address/payment info.
settlements.notes: Final approval April 2026. No claim form exists. Exclusion closed. Deposit accounts don't appear on credit reports — Tier-2 proxy via any Capital One relationship.

settlements.settlement: Jackson v. Athena Bitcoin, Inc. — TCPA/FTSA Text Settlement
settlements.perClaimant: Share of fund
settlements.classDefinition: IDNC Class: U.S. residential telephone subscribers who sent STOP to Athena Bitcoin between Aug 20, 2020 and Aug 20, 2024 and received 2+ further texts in a 12-month period.
settlements.whatToProvide: Cell number(s) that received the texts; Class Member ID preferred for online filing but paper claim possible without.
settlements.notes: From case-intake workbook deep pass (2026-06-09). Opt-out/objection closed; claims open to 6/30.

settlements.settlement: Ford v. Genesis Financial Solutions, Inc. (Maryland CLEC unlicensed lending)
settlements.perClaimant: Varies
settlements.classDefinition: Maryland consumers with Genesis-serviced accounts (Genesis Financial Solutions, now Concora Credit; incl. Milestone-branded cards).
settlements.whatToProvide: Claim form + PIN from mailed notice (PIN required to file online).
settlements.notes: From case-intake workbook deep pass. Needs mailed PIN — outreach must locate the notice. Payment ~45 days after final approval.

settlements.settlement: Blackburn et al. v. National Credit Adjusters, LLC (Virginia/Speedy Cash)
settlements.perClaimant: Debt cancel + credit-report deletion
settlements.classDefinition: Virginia consumers per settlement (NCA-collected accounts, incl. Speedy Cash-originated debt).
settlements.whatToProvide: Nothing — relief applied automatically.
settlements.notes: From case-intake workbook. Class fixed; nothing to file.

settlements.perClaimant: Varies; CFPB-determined
settlements.classDefinition: Federal student loan borrowers harmed by Navient servicing failures (forbearance steering etc.) per CFPB order.
settlements.whatToProvide: Nothing — checks mailing since 2026-02-13; ensure current address with Epiq.
settlements.notes: Government redress, not a class settlement; no claims process.

settlements.settlement: Exeter Finance Mass Arbitration (processing/convenience fees)
settlements.perClaimant: Varies by arbitration
settlements.classDefinition: No court class. Intake: had an Exeter Finance auto loan and paid fees through Exeter's online/phone payment channels.
settlements.whatToProvide: Name, contact, confirmation of Exeter loan; loan docs/statements strengthen the claim.
settlements.notes: Law-firm sign-up, not a settlement. Rolling; practical limit is each person's SOL.

settlements.settlement: Hyundai/Kia Multistate Immobilizer Theft Settlement ($4.5M + $9M companion)
settlements.perClaimant: $375-$4,500 depending on theft-loss tier
settlements.classDefinition: Owners/lessees of 2011-2022 Hyundai/Kia vehicles without factory engine immobilizer, with software upgrade installed/scheduled, and a qualifying theft/attempt on/after 2025-04-29 before zinc-sleeve installation.
settlements.whatToProvide: Claim form; vehicle/VIN; theft documentation (police report, insurance).
settlements.notes: Long window (to 2027-03-31). Theft event required — Tier-2 attestation on top of auto tradeline match.

settlements.settlement: FTC v. Amazon — Prime Enrollment/Cancellation Settlement ($2.5B)
settlements.perClaimant: Up to $51 reimbursement of Prime fees
settlements.classDefinition: U.S. consumers who signed up for Prime June 23, 2019 - June 23, 2025, used >3 but <10 Prime benefits in any 12-month period, and unintentionally enrolled via a challenged flow or were unable to cancel online. Many paid automatically; others must claim.
settlements.whatToProvide: Claim ID and PIN from the email/mail notice (sent by 2026-01-28); payment via PayPal/Venmo/check.
settlements.notes: Notice-gated: claim requires the mailed/emailed Claim ID + PIN.

settlements.perClaimant: Pro rata by home-sale commission
settlements.classDefinition: Home sellers who listed on an MLS and paid a broker commission during the covered periods (varies by settlement).
settlements.whatToProvide: CLOSED — the home-seller claim deadline for the settlement waves passed Dec 30, 2025.
settlements.notes: EXPIRED for new claims. Check the official site's Key Dates page for any later-added settlement waves before writing it off.

settlements.settlement: Hillcrest Convalescent Center Data Breach Settlement
settlements.perClaimant: $50 cash (no proof) or documented losses up to $2,500 + credit monitoring
settlements.classDefinition: Individuals whose data was exposed in the June 2024 Hillcrest Convalescent Center incident (~106,194 people).
settlements.whatToProvide: Claim via official settlement site (lookup by name / last-4 SSN / email).
settlements.notes: Portal URL not captured in sweep — confirm before outreach.

settlements.settlement: In re Google Assistant Privacy Litigation
settlements.perClaimant: Pro rata; user claims need no proof, device-purchaser claims need proof of purchase
settlements.classDefinition: Buyers of Google Home/Nest Hub/Pixel devices and Google Assistant users whose communications were captured by False Accepts, May 18, 2016 - Mar 19, 2026.
settlements.whatToProvide: Claim form by 8/27; receipts/serial numbers only for the device-purchaser tier.
settlements.notes: Broad population-overlap play — most adults qualify as Assistant users.

settlements.settlement: Google Play Store Antitrust Settlement (states + consumers, $630M consumer fund)
settlements.perClaimant: Automatic payments to eligible Play Store purchasers
settlements.classDefinition: Consumers who made Google Play purchases Aug 16, 2016 - Sept 30, 2023 (state AG antitrust settlement).
settlements.whatToProvide: Nothing — eligible consumers were paid automatically; claims period closed.
settlements.notes: Automatic distribution largely complete — historic; do not pitch.

settlements.settlement: A.B. et al. v. Google LLC (Play children's privacy / COPPA)
settlements.perClaimant: Est. $40-$200 per filer
settlements.classDefinition: Children younger than 13 who downloaded/used Google Play apps (parents file on their behalf).
settlements.whatToProvide: Claim form online or postmarked by 9/14; parent/guardian attestation.
settlements.notes: Parent-demographic outreach angle.

settlements.settlement: Family Medicine Centers Data Breach Settlement
settlements.perClaimant: ~$75 pro rata (no proof) or documented losses up to $5,000; 2 yrs CyEx monitoring
settlements.classDefinition: Individuals who received notice of the July 2022 Family Medicine Centers data breach (~266,540 people).
settlements.whatToProvide: Claim form online or postmarked by 8/31.
settlements.notes: Notice-recipient class.

settlements.settlement: Circle K (Gas Express) Data Incident Settlement
settlements.perClaimant: $50 cash (no proof) or documented losses up to $2,000; 2 yrs monitoring + $1M insurance
settlements.classDefinition: Individuals impacted by the May 2024 Circle K / Gas Express data breach.
settlements.whatToProvide: Claim form online at gasexpressdatasettlement.com/form/claim or postmarked by 9/03.
settlements.notes: Employee-skewed class.

settlements.settlement: Labcorp AMCA Data Breach Settlement
settlements.perClaimant: Documented losses up to $5,000; $50 CA subclass; credit monitoring + restoration
settlements.classDefinition: Individuals whose personal/health information was compromised in the AMCA breach affecting Labcorp, Aug 1, 2018 - Mar 30, 2019.
settlements.whatToProvide: Claim form online or postmarked by 9/03.
settlements.notes: Tier-1 angle: medical-collection tradelines naming AMCA / Retrieval-Masters.

settlements.settlement: In re Lemonade Inc. Data Disclosure Litigation (driver's license numbers)
settlements.administrator: Kroll Settlement Administration LLC (P.O. Box 225391, NY)
settlements.perClaimant: Documented losses up to $10,000 + pro rata cash; 3 yrs monitoring automatic
settlements.classDefinition: ~190,000 individuals whose driver's license numbers were exposed via Lemonade's quote platform April 2023 - September 2024.
settlements.whatToProvide: Claim form online or by mail by 9/08.
settlements.notes: CAUTION: lemonadeprivacysettlement.com is a DIFFERENT (older) Lemonade case. Driver's-license portal URL not captured — confirm with Kroll before outreach.

settlements.settlement: Mercedes-Benz BlueTEC AEM Incentive Program (state AG settlement)
settlements.perClaimant: $2,000 per vehicle (current owners/lessees completing AEM repair)
settlements.classDefinition: Owners/lessees of 2009-2016 Mercedes BlueTEC diesel vehicles who have the Approved Emission Modification installed at an authorized dealership Aug 1, 2023 - Aug 31, 2026.
settlements.whatToProvide: AEM repair must be completed by 8/31/2026 at an authorized dealer, then claim at mbaemincentive.com/Login by 9/30.
settlements.notes: Two-step: repair first (by 8/31), claim second (by 9/30).

settlements.settlement: Toyota Airbag Control Unit Settlement
settlements.perClaimant: Up to $250 residual cash + recall-expense reimbursement
settlements.classDefinition: Current/former owners and lessees of 2011-2019 Corolla, 2011-2013 Corolla Matrix, 2012-2018 Avalon (+Hybrid), 2012-2019 Tacoma, 2012-2017 Tundra/Sequoia with ZF-TRW airbag control units.
settlements.whatToProvide: Claim form with vehicle/VIN; receipts for reimbursement tier.
settlements.notes: Long window. Auto-tradeline matchable (Toyota Motor Credit).

settlements.settlement: Hyundai-Kia Airbag Control Unit Settlement (ZF-TRW)
settlements.perClaimant: Up to $350 (recalled vehicles) or $150 (unrecalled) + recall-expense reimbursement
settlements.classDefinition: Current/former owners and lessees of 2011-2019 Sonata, 2018-2023 Kona, 2019-2021 Veloster, 2010-2013 Forte, 2011-2020 Optima, 2011-2012/2014 Sedona with ZF-TRW airbag control units.
settlements.whatToProvide: Claim form with vehicle/VIN; receipts for reimbursement tier.
settlements.notes: Deadline EXTENDED to 2027-04-08 (catalog had 3/29). Auto-tradeline matchable.

tokens: equity bank ks mo ar ok
settlements.settlement: Merrell v. Equity Bank (overdraft/NSF fees)
settlements.perClaimant: Automatic check, account credit, or fee forgiveness
settlements.classDefinition: Equity Bank accountholders charged APSN fees (2017-2019, 2020-2024), retry fees (2018-2023), or sufficient-funds fees (2017-2025).
settlements.whatToProvide: Nothing — automatic after final approval.
settlements.notes: NO CLAIM FORM — automatic.

settlements.settlement: Nissan Murano/Maxima CVT Settlement
settlements.perClaimant: Warranty extension (84mo/84K automatic) + reimbursement/voucher for timely claims
settlements.classDefinition: Purchasers/lessees of 2015-2018 Murano and 2016-2018 Maxima with defective CVT.
settlements.whatToProvide: CLOSED for cash claims — checks for timely filers mailed Jan 30, 2026. Warranty extension applies automatically.
settlements.notes: EXPIRED as a claim window (was wrongly carried as rolling). Warranty extension is the only live benefit; late claims occasionally accepted — verify individually.

settlements.settlement: Chapter Aesthetic Studio TCPA Settlement
settlements.perClaimant: Cash per settlement terms
settlements.classDefinition: Individuals who received texts from Chapter Aesthetic Studio after replying STOP.
settlements.whatToProvide: Claim deadline is TODAY (6/11) — effectively closed for outreach purposes.
settlements.notes: Do not pitch — no time to act.

settlements.settlement: Patelco Credit Union Data Breach Settlement
settlements.perClaimant: Cash per settlement terms
settlements.classDefinition: Members affected by the June 2024 Patelco ransomware breach.
settlements.whatToProvide: Claim deadline is TODAY (6/11) — effectively closed for outreach purposes.
settlements.notes: Do not pitch — no time to act.

settlements.settlement: Townsel v. Henderson & Walton Women's Center, P.C.
settlements.perClaimant: Up to $2,500 documented losses + up to $90 lost time ($30/hr x 3); 3 yrs one-bureau credit monitoring
settlements.classDefinition: Individuals whose personal or protected health information was potentially compromised in the Henderson & Walton Women's Center data breach of Feb 11-14, 2022.
settlements.whatToProvide: Claim form online (notice ID + confirmation code from settlement notice) or PDF by mail.
settlements.notes: Notice-gated for online filing.
